author: tmiychao
content:
EPF cohort 7 is here! Today, we marks the week 0, preparation time to get ready for the fellowship. We are kicking off soon, check this message for all details 🚀 

**The kick off call:** The official start of EPF7 is next week Monday, we will have a kick off call on** June 15 at 3PM UTC** (your timezone <t:1781535600:F>). Make sure to attend the call or at least check recording afterwards, I understand the timezone does not work for everyone so it's not a problem. We will provide introduction on what to expect in this cohort and guidance for your first weeks. We will be using this link, everyone is welcomed to join https://meet.ethereum.org/epf-office-hours. If you are in Berlin during this time, let us know and we can meet also informally in person! 

Starting next week therefore will be the Week 1 of the fellowship, the actual beginning of the cohort. However I know many of you are eager to start and already did some preliminary research so you can use this week to post your** Week 0 **update. It's an opportunity to gather your thoughts, map areas of research and get used to the process of submitting updates. This is not necessary, just an option for those getting ready - your first update doesn't have to be 0, you can update us later but keep your dev updates at least bi-weekly. Updates are shared in corresponding thread here on discord and are archived in the github repo, check the example there https://github.com/eth-protocol-fellows/cohort-seven/blob/main/development-updates.md 

Before getting started, please** make yourself familiar with the [program guide](https://github.com/eth-protocol-fellows/cohort-seven/tree/main/program-guide)**. Do not attempt to contact mentors at this point - in the first phase of the cohort, I am the mentor for all fellows. I am here for your technical questions, will provide you feedback and later connect you with mentors for specific projects when ready. For now, please hold your questions for the kick off calll. 

EPF awaits!
